seoTitle: Freeling vs Frewville — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Freeling and Frewville. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Freeling and Frewville.
heading: Freeling vs Frewville — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Freeling, South Australia and Frewville, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Freeling has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Frewville (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Freeling or Frewville safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Freeling has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Frewville scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Freeling scores 40/100 for bushfire risk. Frewville scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Freeling or Frewville?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Freeling has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
